home.lead: Build your personal ranking of songs, albums, or artists using Spotify. Pick what you want to compare, then place each track with simple side-by-side song comparisons — no artificial limit on how many songs you rank.
home.featureSearch: Search Spotify for tracks, albums, and artists
home.featureSearchSoon: Search and select tracks from Spotify after you connect
home.featurePairwise: Segment placement: pick where each song belongs in ~⌈log₅(n)⌉ steps per song
home.featureShare: Share or export your final order

search.hint: Type at least 2 characters to search Spotify.
search.minLengthHint: Type at least {{count}} characters to search.
search.noResults: No results. Try a different query.

errors.needLogin: Connect Spotify to search (use the button above or Home).
errors.sessionExpired: Your Spotify session expired. Please connect again.
errors.network: Spotify is unavailable. Check your connection and try again.
errors.artistNoTracks: No tracks found for this artist. Try adding individual songs instead.

rank.title: Rank songs
rank.subtitle: Search Spotify and build your list to rank
rank.subtitleSelect: Search and pick songs on the left; your list stays on the right.
rank.undoLastSong: Undo last placement and place that song again
rank.loginRequired: Connect your Spotify account to search and rank songs.
rank.emptySelection: Search and add tracks on the left.
rank.emptySorted: Sorted list appears here as you rank.
rank.largeListWarning: Large lists take longer — you selected {{count}} songs (more than {{threshold}}). You can still continue; expect roughly ⌈log₅(n)⌉ placement steps per song (~5–10 s each, four reference tracks per step).
rank.timePerDecision: About 5–10 seconds per placement step (up to four songs to compare).
rank.timeInfoLargeList: {{count}} songs selected (over {{threshold}}) — large lists take longer.

compare.hint: Tap the song you like more — we'll place it in your ranking.
compare.segmentPrompt: Tap where it belongs in your ranking

auth.title: Spotify login
auth.notConfigured: OAuth is not configured yet. Add <1>VITE_SPOTIFY_CLIENT_ID</1> and <3>VITE_SPOTIFY_REDIRECT_URI</3> to <5>.env</5>, then restart the dev server (<7>docker compose down && docker compose up</7>).
auth.mockModeHint: Mock mode is on — use <1>Continue without Spotify (dev)</1> on the home page, or connect below for a real token.
auth.connectDescription: Connect your Spotify account to load your library and save rankings.
auth.noToken: No Spotify token — connect to search and rank
auth.loginSuccessBanner: Login successful — search Spotify to add tracks.
auth.noCallbackData: No authorization data in callback URL.

errors.missingPkceVerifier: Missing PKCE verifier. Start login again from the app.
errors.tokenExchangeFailed: Token exchange failed ({{status}}). Check redirect URI and client ID.
errors.missingAuthCode: Missing authorization code in callback URL.
errors.callbackWithoutToken: Login callback was already used but no token is stored. Clear session storage and try again.
errors.redirectUriMismatch: Redirect URI does not match your Spotify app settings. In the Spotify Developer Dashboard, add this exact Redirect URI, then restart the dev server (docker compose down && docker compose up): {{uri}}

auth.redirectUriHint: Spotify login uses this redirect URI — add it exactly under Redirect URIs in the Spotify Developer Dashboard: {{uri}}

redirectWarnings.productionHttps: VITE_SPOTIFY_REDIRECT_URI points at a production HTTPS URL, but you are running the dev server. For local Docker dev use http://127.0.0.1:5173/login/callback (or http://localhost:5173/login/callback), add that exact URI in the Spotify dashboard, then run docker compose down && docker compose up.
redirectWarnings.localHttps: VITE_SPOTIFY_REDIRECT_URI uses https:// but the dev server runs on HTTP. Use http://127.0.0.1:5173/login/callback (or http://localhost:5173/login/callback), add that exact URI in the Spotify dashboard, then run docker compose down && docker compose up.
redirectWarnings.hostnameMismatch: You opened the app at {{browserOrigin}}, but VITE_SPOTIFY_REDIRECT_URI uses {{envHost}}. Spotify requires an exact match — browse {{envOrigin}} or change .env to {{browserOrigin}}/login/callback and restart the dev server.
redirectWarnings.portMismatch: VITE_SPOTIFY_REDIRECT_URI uses port {{envPort}} but the app is on port {{browserPort}}. Update .env and the Spotify dashboard redirect URI, then restart the dev server.

library.playlistHint: Creates a private playlist in your Spotify account (Library → Playlists).

errors.connectToSave: Connect your Spotify account to save this list.
errors.playlistNameRequired: Enter a name for your playlist.
errors.noTracksToSave: There are no tracks in this ranking to save.
errors.partialBatchFailed: Saved {{saved}} of {{total}} items. Some batches failed—try again.
errors.insufficientScope: Your Spotify connection does not include permission to create playlists. Use Reconnect Spotify below, then approve playlist access when Spotify asks.
errors.playlistWriteForbidden: Spotify blocked adding songs to the playlist ({{detail}}). If your app is in Development Mode, only the developer account can use write APIs — reconnect with that account or request Extended Quota in the Spotify Developer Dashboard.
